title: Tunisian Tagine Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with a blend of aromatic spices and tender chicken. Serve over couscous for a truly authentic experience.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the diced red pepper and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the Tunisian spice blend, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the chopped tagine and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pot and shred with two forks.
Return the shredded chicken to the pot and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
